commands.repair_reason: A maintainer needs to make the protected security-policy call and then either land this canonical PR or reject the fallback and align the docs.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain defect was found in the diff; the auth policy change remains explicit, password-only, same-host-only, and disqualified by forwarded-header evidence. commands.review_summary:
The PR restores a password-only same-host local fallback in trusted-proxy Gateway auth, broadens forwarded-header evidence detection, and updates gateway docs, tests, and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible: trusted-proxy failures return before password auth can run, while the docs and linked issue describe a loopback caller with a valid password and no forwarded headers that should succeed.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer needs to make the protected security-policy call and then either land this canonical PR or reject the fallback and align the docs.
